signals.reasoning: Close the live ETH long immediately: it has deteriorated from a tiny +$0.09 peak to -$0.21 live, retains none of peak P&L, is flagged urgent, still has no stop, and the board is under active VETO with relief-style headline flow that makes defending a weak long low quality.
BTC still has constructive trend-supported structure with negative funding underneath, but the active VETO keeps it watch-only instead of a fresh decision during ETH position management.
SOL remains firm and trend-supported, but it is neither breaking down for a clean short nor clean enough to chase long under the live event brake.
GRIFFAIN is already deep into a long-liquidation flush with very negative funding, so it is too extended to chase short and too damaged to trust long in a VETO regime.
TST has strong rebound structure but is already extended and still too event-sensitive to justify forcing a fresh entry while the ETH cleanup is the real priority.
BIO has squeeze fuel and improving structure, but it is thin and incomplete mechanically, which keeps it below the bar for action under VETO.
PEOPLE has some squeeze support, but the data is incomplete and the setup is not clean enough to outrank simply flattening the compromised ETH long first.
ZEC is trend-supported but already crowded on the long side with rising open interest and positive funding, so it is not a clean fresh trade under the event brake.
HYPER looks constructive but remains too incomplete and too small to justify attention over the immediate ETH risk cleanup.
LDO still has one of the cleaner upside structures on the sheet, but the move is already stretched and the VETO keeps it watch-only.
MERL has recovered well but lacks enough depth and clarity to become actionable while the main task is closing the weak live ETH long.
